name: Nuwellis, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Nuwellis is dedicated to advancing cardiorenal care by enabling earlier, safer, and more controlled fluid management for patients. The company is focused on developing, manufacturing, and commercializing medical devices used in ultrafiltration therapy, including the Aquadex FlexFlow and the Aquadex SmartFlow systems (collectively the Aquadex System).
